title: paraphlomis coronata
intro: Paraphlomis coronata, also known as Chinese hyptis or crown lemongrass, is a plant species belonging to the family Lamiaceae, native to Asia and known for its fragrant leaves and purple flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Paraphlomis coronata include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in digestion. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and essential oils, often used to promote relaxation and alleviate stress.
